## Test plan

- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] `cd relay && npm run typecheck` passes (if touching relay/pair-page)
- [ ] Manually walked the relevant section of `docs/TESTING.md` (if touching UI / voice / iTerm2 / Telegram)
- [ ] Added/updated `tests/test_*.py` for testable changes
- [ ] Added/updated docs (CLAUDE.md, docs/USAGE*, README, CHANGELOG) if behavior visible to users
